topics.topic_ar: معالجة المقاطعات والتفاعل بين العتاد والبرمجيات
topics.query_en: Operating systems interrupts and I/O operations explained
topics.query_ar: شرح المقاطعات interrupts في نظم التشغيل
topics.reason: Students struggle with the asynchronous nature of interrupts and how the CPU halts execution to save state and handle hardware signals.

topics.topic_en: Direct Memory Access (DMA) and Cycle Stealing
topics.query_en: Direct Memory Access DMA operating systems tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح Direct Memory Access DMA نظم تشغيل
topics.reason: Understanding how the DMA controller bypasses the CPU to independently manage memory buses and transfer data often confuses beginners.

topics.query_en: Dual mode operation user and kernel mode OS
topics.query_ar: شرح user mode and kernel mode نظم التشغيل
topics.reason: Visualizing the transition between user mode and kernel mode via hardware timers and traps requires a solid grasp of CPU architecture.

topics.topic_en: System Calls Execution and Parameter Passing
topics.topic_ar: تنفيذ نداءات النظام (System Calls) وتمرير المعاملات
topics.query_en: How system calls work in operating systems
topics.query_ar: شرح system calls في نظم التشغيل
topics.reason: The abstraction layer between high-level application APIs and low-level kernel software interrupts is difficult to conceptualize.

topics.topic_ar: المعالجة المتعددة المتماثلة (SMP) وتناسق الذاكرة المخبئية
topics.query_en: Multiprocessor architecture SMP vs AMP operating systems
topics.reason: Concepts like cache coherence, memory sharing, and synchronization across multiple processing cores introduce complex concurrency issues.
